title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
